scripts.setup: uv sync && uv run python manage.py migrate
scripts.test: cross-env PYTHONPATH=. uv run manage.py test apps.trips
scripts.test:unit: cross-env PYTHONPATH=. TEST_MODE=unit uv run python manage.py test apps.trips.tests.test_unit
scripts.test:integration: cross-env PYTHONPATH=. TEST_MODE=integration uv run python manage.py test apps.trips.tests.test_integration
